heading: Consideration of Commission findings by departments and agencies
label: 4213 Consideration of Commission findings by departments and agencies
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 1989b–2 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

children.heading: Review of applications by eligible individuals
children.label: a Review of applications by eligible individuals
children.text: Each department and agency of the United States Government shall review with liberality, giving full consideration to the findings of the Commission and the statement of the Congress set forth in , any application by an eligible individual for the restitution of any position, status, or entitlement lost in whole or in part because of any discriminatory act of the United States Government against such individual which was based upon the individual’s Japanese ancestry and which occurred during the evacuation, relocation, and internment period.section 4202(a) of this title

children.heading: No new authority created
children.label: b No new authority created
children.text: Subsection (a) does not create any authority to grant restitution described in that subsection, or establish any eligibility to apply for such restitution.
